---
title: "Personal"
---

 
I'm originally from Nara, Japan. 
I'm enthusiastic about watching sports, especially baseball and basketball. 

::: {.column-page}
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Orix Buffaloes](pictures/hobby.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![My Home Town](pictures/hometown.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::
:::

![Detroit Pistons](pictures/pistons.jpeg){width="50%" .gallery-img}
